'''chazuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averdupois|averdupois]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averdupois|averdupois]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzihith|chæzihith]] || [[word:chæzihij|chæzihij]] || [[word:chæzihish|chæzihish]] || [[word:chæzihi|chæzihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzuhuth|chazuzuhuth]] || [[word:chazuzuhuj|chazuzuhuj]] || [[word:chazuzuhush|chazuzuhush]] || [[word:chazuzuhu|chazuzuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazuhuth|chazuhuth]] || [[word:chazuhuj|chazuhuj]] || [[word:chazuhush|chazuhush]] || [[word:chazuhu|chazuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazufhuth|chazufhuth]] || [[word:chazufhuj|chazufhuj]] || [[word:chazufhush|chazufhush]] || [[word:chazufhuf|chazufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazuhuthu|chazuhuthu]] || [[word:chazuhuju|chazuhuju]] || [[word:chazuhushu|chazuhushu]] || [[word:chazuhuku|chazuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazuhuth|chazuhuth]] || [[word:chazuhuj|chazuhuj]] || [[word:chazuhush|chazuhush]] || [[word:chazuhu|chazuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazuhuthul|chazuhuthul]] || [[word:chazuhujul|chazuhujul]] || [[word:chazuhushul|chazuhushul]] || [[word:chazuhukul|chazuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazuhuthuthu|chazuhuthuthu]] || [[word:chazuhujuju|chazuhujuju]] || [[word:chazuhushushu|chazuhushushu]] || [[word:chazuhuku|chazuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazuhuthun|chazuhuthun]] || [[word:chazuhujun|chazuhujun]] || [[word:chazuhushun|chazuhushun]] || [[word:chazuhukun|chazuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazuhuthuoro|chazuhuthuoro]] || [[word:chazuhujuoro|chazuhujuoro]] || [[word:chazuhushuoro|chazuhushuoro]] || [[word:chazuhukuoro|chazuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
